title: Beckwithia andersonii

intro: Beckwithia andersonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the mountain tea or Andaman mountain tea. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, providing relief from symptoms of stress, anxiety, and insomnia, while also acting as an antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of Beckwithia andersonii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits.
